channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bumblebees with tiny brains solve problems like chimps and elephants
item.description: New study suggests bumblebees may solve problems spontaneously, similar to larger-brained animals.

item.title: At least 12 shot at Ohio festival; suspects still at large, police say
item.description: Gunfire at a busy Ohio street festival wounded at least 12 people, causing panic and a continuing search for suspects.

item.title: AIDS workers in Africa feel impact of U.S. foreign aid changes
item.description: Health providers in South Africa and Mozambique report that cancellation or redirection of U.S. PEPFAR funding under the Trump administration has already affected their work.

item.title: One million people line Madrid streets for pope's flower-carpeted procession
item.description: The crowd cheered and shouted "This is the youth of the pope!" as Pope Leo arrived for Mass at a central Madrid plaza. It is the first papal visit to Spain in years.
